hero.title:
Gamify your product.
Boost engagement & retain customers.
hero.desc: Q Gamification helps you integrate gamification into digital products quickly, flexibly, and with measurable results.

effective.title: Effective
effective.desc: Track engagement and customer retention impact.

diverse.title: Flexible
diverse.desc: Works across many products and partner scenarios.

problem.title: Customers don’t return because they lack motivation
problem.subtitle: Marketing costs keep rising, but users drop off after only a few sessions.

items.p2: Low return rates make it hard to build usage habits.
items.p3: Lack of tools to create long-term motivation.

modules.title: Gamification — built for real businesses
modules.subtitle: Q Gamification lets teams launch proven gamification mechanics without rebuilding everything from scratch.

games.title: Games
games.desc: A rich mini-game library: Spin, Quiz, Puzzle...

tracking.title: Analytics
tracking.desc: Behavior insights and campaign performance tracking.

platform.title: Gamification as a Platform
platform.desc: Q Gamification is designed as a multi-tenant platform so multiple products and partners can share one gamification system.

tenant.title: Multi-tenant support
tenant.desc: Manage multiple partners in one platform.

security.title: Security & compliance
security.desc: Enterprise-grade security to keep user data safe.

why.title: Why choose Q Gamification?
why.desc: Q Gamification delivers an effective way to increase engagement. You focus on your product — Q handles retention.

s3.label: Time to launch a new campaign.

fast.title: Fast
fast.desc: Integrate via SDK & API quickly without impacting your existing system.

minigames.title: Mini Games
minigames.desc: Ready-to-run mini games — no dedicated game team required.

scale.title: Scalable
scale.desc: High-load architecture ready for millions of concurrent users.

testimonials.title: Results from real campaigns
testimonials.subtitle: See how growth teams improve engagement, conversion, and retention with Q.

items.text: Our activation campaigns used to have a completion rate of around 18%. After launching Q, mission completion rose to 47%, and average engagement time increased by 3x.
items.name: Minh Anh Nguyen

items.text: We used Q for new-user onboarding. Completion increased from 52% to 81% in just 2 months. Missions and rewards helped users explore the product instead of dropping off.
items.name: Quang Huy Tran

items.text: Our engineering team integrated Q via API in under a week. Clear docs, stable SDK, and strong performance during a campaign with 120,000+ participants.
items.name: Duc Thanh Le

items.text: Before Q, our referral push felt like a one-off promo. With mission-based referrals, share-to-signup conversion improved by 38% and we saw steadier daily invites instead of spikes.
items.name: Thu Ha Pham

items.text: Q helped us re-engage dormant users with segmented missions. Reactivation rate increased from 6.5% to 14.2%, and churn in the following month dropped noticeably.
items.name: Tuan Kiet Vo

items.text: We ran a 14-day streak challenge using Q. Daily active participation averaged 62% of eligible users, and our weekly retention improved by 19% compared to the previous cohort.
items.name: Linh Chi Do

items.text: For a seasonal campaign, Q's leaderboard and rewards made a big difference. Purchase frequency increased by 1.4x and the campaign ROI beat our baseline by 27%.
items.name: Bao Long Nguyen

items.text: We replaced a long tutorial with progressive missions in Q. Support tickets related to onboarding dropped by 22%, and users reached the ‘first success’ action much faster.
items.name: Mai Khoa Le

items.text: Localization was smooth for our bilingual audience. With Q, engagement from the non-default language segment increased by 31% without extra engineering work.
items.name: Khanh Vy Truong

pricing.title: Pricing that scales with growth
pricing.subtitle: Q scales with your impact. As your users and behaviors grow, Q grows with you.

q1.a: No. Q Gamification is a quest-based engagement platform — not an entertainment game.

q2.q: What types of businesses is it for?
q2.a: Ideal for B2B, B2C, and Enterprise teams that want to boost engagement for customers, employees, or partners.

q3.q: Do we need engineers to operate it?
q3.a: Not necessarily. Tenants can monitor, measure, and optimize campaigns without deep technical involvement.

q4.a: Real-time dashboards: quest completion, participation level, repeat behavior, and actionable insights.

q5.q: Can it integrate with existing systems?
q5.a: Yes. Q provides API & SDK to integrate with CRM, apps, websites, or internal systems.

q6.a: Yes. Built with enterprise-grade security, tenant-based access control, and best-practice compliance.

q7.a: Typically 1–2 weeks for a standard campaign, faster if your integrations are ready.

q8.q: Is there a trial or demo?
q8.a: Yes. You can request a demo to experience the platform and preview sample dashboards.

footer.about: At Q Gamification, we treat your customers as our customers — every interaction is a designed journey that drives real outcomes.
footer.subscribeDesc: Leave your info to receive important announcements.
